title: Iris Extension
description: An extension for the Minecraft shader loader Iris with some useful features for shader developers.
body:
An extension for the Minecraft shader loader Iris.


This mod needs a shader that utilizes its features, otherwise it will do nothing!


Currently the mod provides shader developers the ability to use up to 10 custom keybinds for the shader. Additionally it allows shader devs to create more custom effects by giving access to more player and world information to the shader.


Current shaderpacks utilizing features of the mod:
- [Eclipse (Bliss Edit)](https://github.com/Merlin1809/Eclipse-Shader)


For detailed information about the mod's features please visit the wiki: https://github.com/Merlin1809/IrisExtension/wiki
